meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve no project ideas (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Antigravity Template to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no project ideas' trap with our Antigravity project template. A high-leverage guide for founders to build, ship, and monetize faster.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for inspiration. The Antigravity project template provides a battle-tested architecture that forces rapid iteration. By combining structured boilerplate with Claude Code's autonomous execution, you bridge the gap between 'no ideas' and a revenue-generating MVP in hours, not weeks. It is time to treat ideation as a system.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. You have the technical stack, the drive, and the capital, yet you remain paralyzed by the 'no project ideas' trap. It is a common affliction for founders who mistake complexity for value. But the most successful SaaS products aren't born from lightning strikes; they are engineered from repetitive, solvable pain points.

Today, we shift from passive ideation to active construction. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you gain a rigid, scalable foundation that dictates the structure of your application. No more architectural indecision. We are moving from the concept phase to a deployed, monetizable asset using the raw power of Claude Code to accelerate your execution cycle.

steps.title: Define the Value-Driven Domain
steps.description: Don't search for ideas; search for inefficient workflows. Identify a niche where users are currently spending money on spreadsheets or manual labor.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate 5 SaaS project ideas focused on B2B micro-SaaS niches with high willingness-to-pay, excluding saturated markets like generic CRM or To-Do apps.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Analyze these 5 ideas for market viability and technical complexity, ranking them by fastest time-to-revenue.'

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Use the Antigravity template to create a modular, type-safe environment that handles authentication and database schema generation automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Bootstrap an Antigravity project template with Supabase for auth, Stripe for payments, and a Next.js frontend, ensuring a clean separation of concerns.

steps.title: Implement the Core MVP Logic
steps.description: Focus strictly on the 'One Thing' your app does. Discard all secondary features that don't directly solve the user's primary problem.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer in the Antigravity project that performs the core logic identified in step 1, ensuring error handling and logging are integrated.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Create service/core-logic.ts with unit tests following the existing project structure.'

steps.title: Configure Autonomous Testing
steps.description: Use Claude Code to write integration tests that ensure your core business logic never breaks during rapid iterations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of end-to-end tests for the user authentication and payment flow, simulating a real customer journey.
steps.claude_code_command: claude test 'Run the suite and fix any import or type errors in the test directory.'

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Push your build to production. Speed to market is your primary competitive advantage, not feature parity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provide a checklist for deploying this Antigravity project to Vercel, including environment variable management and security best practices.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Verify production build configuration and readiness for deployment.'

pro_tips: Prioritize 'boring' problems; B2B back-office automation pays significantly more than consumer social apps.
Use Claude Code to refactor your boilerplate into a custom internal library once you hit your third project.
Never build an admin panel from scratch; leverage Antigravity's built-in components to save 20+ hours of UI work.
Validate demand by building a landing page with a waitlist before writing a single line of application logic.
Keep your database schema flexible using JSONB columns to pivot your data model without expensive migrations.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, implement a feedback loop by tracking user interactions via PostHog. Use that data to iterate on the specific features users actually click on, rather than what you imagine they need.
content.conversion_block: Stop chasing inspiration and start engineering your way to a recurring revenue stream. You have the tools, the template, and the roadmap to bypass the noise and build something that matters. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
